title: CreateR
description: All your favorite tech mods, in one simple to use modpack
body:
![Modpack Banner (Decoration)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ef0401195a12af5bc37d56d9cad617a017af1b8_0.webp)

# Overview
Welcome to CreateR. The new and inventive modpack for those who love the Create Mod, and beyond. Specialising in Create, Valkarian Skies, and Mekanism, this is the perfect Modpack for those interested in Technology and problem solving.

> ## Disclaimer
> This modpack is under development, and may experience issues. I am a solo developer, working on multiple projects, although if you are ever stuck or confused, don't be affraid to reach out via my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/MYp25XeaEG).

## Found something that doesn't look right?
Let me know! I am always happy to hear feedback, and will try my best to keep the modpack up to date for anyone who uses it. If you find a feature that doesn't quite work right, or a mis-match in the configurations, feel free to tell me so I can help resolve it.

## Featured Mods Included
> Not all mods are included in this list. For a complete list of mods, please check each version page.
> * Mechanism
> * Create
> * Create: Steam 'n' Rails
> * Valkarian Skies
> * Computer Craft (CCTweaks)
> * [Electrodynamics (and related mods)](https://modrinth.com/mod/electrodynamics)

## Included Features
> * Custom Launcher *(Soon)*
> * Up-to-date Mods

**Please note, This modpack is based on Create version 0.5.1j. Please do __not__ try to update the mods in the modpack, or your instance will fail to launch. For troubleshooting or help, ask in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/MYp25XeaEG).**
